summary.en: IEC 62196 covers plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors, and vehicle inlets for conductive EV charging. Chile-facing projects commonly need IEC-style connector evidence and local vehicle-park compatibility review; a China GB/T 20234 connector set should not be assumed mechanically or functionally compatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 interfaces.
summary.zh: IEC 62196覆盖电动汽车传导充电用插头、插座、车辆连接器和车辆插座。面向智利的项目通常需要IEC接口证据和当地车型兼容性审查；不应假定中国GB/T 20234接口组件与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2接口在机械或功能上兼容。
summary.zht: IEC 62196覆蓋電動汽車傳導充電用插頭、插座、車輛連接器和車輛插座。面向智利的項目通常需要IEC接口證據和當地車型相容性審查；不應假定中國GB/T 20234接口組件與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2接口在機械或功能上相容。

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234 for conductive charging connection devices. GB/T 20234.2 and GB/T 20234.3 define China-market AC and DC interfaces and should be treated as a separate connector system from IEC 62196 implementations unless an adapter or dual-standard design is specifically validated.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 20234作为传导充电连接装置基线。GB/T 20234.2和GB/T 20234.3定义中国市场交流和直流接口，除非适配器或双标准设计经过专门验证，否则应视为不同于IEC 62196实施的接口系统。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 20234作為傳導充電連接裝置基線。GB/T 20234.2和GB/T 20234.3定義中國市場交流和直流接口，除非適配器或雙標準設計經過專門驗證，否則應視為不同於IEC 62196實施的接口系統。

gap.en: Prepare connector drawings, pinout, mating-cycle ratings, locking behavior, IP rating, temperature-rise test evidence, cable ratings, and vehicle compatibility evidence. For DC chargers, separate the power connector gap from the communication-protocol gap.
gap.zh: 应准备接口图纸、针脚定义、插拔寿命、锁止行为、防护等级、温升测试证据、电缆额定值和车辆兼容性证据。对于直流充电机，应将功率接口差距与通信协议差距分开处理。
gap.zht: 應準備接口圖紙、針腳定義、插拔壽命、鎖止行為、防護等級、溫升測試證據、電纜額定值和車輛相容性證據。對於直流充電機，應將功率接口差距與通信協議差距分開處理。

mandatory_status.target: Project, interoperability, customer, or installation dependent unless a Chile rule, SEC protocol, tender, or utility requirement expressly specifies the connector standard
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is the common China-market connector baseline; mandatory status depends on Chinese product and project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A GB/T 20234 connector is a major Chile market-fit risk unless the Chile project explicitly accepts it or the charger is redesigned and validated for the IEC 62196 connector family expected by the site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非智利项目明确接受，或充电桩已按现场预期的IEC 62196接口族重新设计并验证，否则GB/T 20234接口是重大的智利市场适配风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非智利項目明確接受，或充電樁已按現場預期的IEC 62196接口族重新設計並驗證，否則GB/T 20234接口是重大的智利市場適配風險。
